summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening now anchors directly to Gavin returning the following night, which better follows chapter 7 and avoids mirroring chapter 9's object-first sub-collection opening, and the closing now states his decision to go back to the sub-collection, which points cleanly into the next chapter's later work routine.
edits: Reframed the opening around Gavin's return the following night and compressed the time-loss setup into the second paragraph.
Added a final decision beat that he will go back to the sub-collection, strengthening the handoff into the next chapter's time jump.
